name: Clock Tower Prison
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>幽</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ゆう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>獄</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ごく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>時</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>と</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>計</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>けい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>塔</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>とう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Once per turn, during your opponent's Standby Phase: Place 1 Clock Counter on this card. While there are 4 or more Clock Counters on this card, you do not take any battle damage. If this card with 4 or more Clock Counters is destroyed and sent to the GY: Special Summon 1 "Destiny HERO - Dreadmaster" from your hand or Deck.
eff: Once per turn, during your opponent's Standby Phase: Place 1 Clock Counter on this card. While there are 4 or more Clock Counters on this card, you do not take any battle damage. If this card with 4 or more Clock Counters is destroyed and sent to the GY: Special Summon 1 "Destiny HERO - Dreadmaster" from your hand or Deck.

sets.set: Legendary Collection 2: The Duel Academy Years Mega Pack

action: Activates if destroyed by card effect
